name: Computer Engineering
description: Trains technologists in computer hardware, embedded systems and software engineering practice.

name: Electrical/Electronic Engineering
description: Covers power systems, electronics and telecommunications engineering technology.

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: Produces graduates skilled in production, thermofluid and maintenance engineering.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Focuses on structural, geotechnical and highway engineering technology.

name: Business Administration and Management
description: Prepares graduates for management roles across public and private organisations.

name: Marketing
description: Builds competence in sales, marketing communications and consumer behaviour.

name: Office Technology and Management
description: Trains office professionals in modern secretarial and administrative technology.

name: Science Laboratory Technology
description: Equips technologists to manage laboratory operations in science-based industries.

name: Statistics
description: Provides training in data collection, analysis and statistical reporting.

name: Architectural Technology
description: Covers building design, construction drawing and architectural documentation.

name: Estate Management
description: Trains professionals in property valuation, management and real estate practice.

name: Accountancy
description: Develops competence in financial accounting, auditing and taxation.

name: Banking and Finance
description: Prepares graduates for careers in banking, investment and financial management.
